languages.text: "Протокол проверки показал, что священная машина была заражена ксеноересью, обозначенной как "анкер-ядро" не менее тридцати полных оборотов назад. Артизан Декабалус-4-16 руководил станцией все указанное время. Он общался с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинным духом{/g} буровой установки и лично освятил ее. Он не мог не знать о техноскверне, питающей ее внутренние механизмы".

traits.locale_text: "Протокол проверки показал, что священная машина была заражена ксеноересью, обозначенной как "анкер-ядро" не менее тридцати полных оборотов назад. Артизан Декабалус-4-16 руководил станцией все указанное время. Он общался с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинным духом{/g} буровой установки и лично освятил ее. Он не мог не знать о техноскверне, питающей ее внутренние механизмы".

languages.text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."
languages.original_text: "Протокол проверки показал, что священная машина была заражена ксеноересью, обозначенной как "анкер-ядро" не менее тридцати полных оборотов назад. Он не мог не знать о техноскверне, питающей ее внутренние механизмы".

languages.text: 「検査記録によると、聖なる機械は少なくとも30回転前、異教のアンカーコアに汚染されていた。その期間は、職人デカバルス4-16が担当していた。彼はドリル機の機械霊とコミュニケーションを取り、自ら聖別を行った。機械の内部機構を動かすテクノロジーの腐敗を、彼は知らなかったはずがない」
languages.original_text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the machine spirit of the drill rig and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."

traits.locale_text: 「検査記録によると、聖なる機械は少なくとも30回転前、異教の「アンカーコア」に汚染されていた。その期間は、職人デカバルス4-16が担当していた。彼はドリル機の機械霊とコミュニケーションを取り、自ら聖別を行った。機械の内部機構を動かすテクノロジーの腐敗を、彼は知らなかったはずがない。」

languages.text: «El protocolo de inspección indicó que la sagrada máquina había sido contaminada con xenoherejía identificada como "núcleo de anclaje" hace al menos 30 rotaciones completas. La unidad artesana Decabalus-4-16 estuvo a cargo de la estación durante todo el plazo indicado. Se comunicó con el {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del complejo y lo consagró personalmente. Es imposible que no fuera consciente de la tecnocorrupción que alimentaba sus mecanismos internos».
languages.original_text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."

traits.locale_text: «El protocolo de inspección indicó que la sagrada máquina había sido contaminada con xenoherejía identificada como "núcleo de anclaje" hace al menos 30 rotaciones completas. La unidad artesana Decabalus-4-16 estuvo a cargo de la estación durante todo el plazo indicado. Se comunicó con el {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g} del complejo y lo consagró personalmente. Es imposible que no fuera consciente de la tecnocorrupción que alimentaba sus mecanismos internos».

languages.text: “检查协议显示，这台神圣机械至少在三十个完整周期前就已受到异形造物——即所谓‘锚核’的污染。匠人德卡巴洛斯-4-16在此期间一直负责本星站。他与钻探中枢的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通过，还亲自为其祝圣。他不可能不知道驱动其内部的是什么腐败技术。”
languages.original_text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."

traits.locale_text: “检查协议显示，这台神圣机械至少在三十个完整周期前就已受到异形造物——即所谓‘锚核’的污染。匠人德卡巴洛斯-4-16在此期间一直负责本星站。他与钻探中枢的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通过，还亲自为其祝圣。他不可能不知道驱动其内部的是什么腐败技术。”

languages.text: "Dem Inspektionsprotokoll zufolge wurde die heilige Maschine vor mindestes 30 vollen Zyklen mit einer Xeno-Ketzerei namens 'Ankerkern' kontaminiert. Artifex Decabalus-4-16 war während des gesamten Zeitraums für die Station verantwortlich. Er kommunizierte mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} des Bohrkomplexes und entweihte ihn. Die Tech-Korruption in seinen internen Mechanismen kann ihm unmöglich entgangen sein."
languages.original_text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."

traits.locale_text: "Dem Inspektionsprotokoll zufolge wurde die heilige Maschine vor mindestes 30 vollen Zyklen mit einer Xeno-Ketzerei namens 'Ankerkern' kontaminiert. Artifex Decabalus-4-16 war während des gesamten Zeitraums für die Station verantwortlich. Er kommunizierte mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeist{/g} des Bohrkomplexes und entweihte ihn. Die Tech-Korruption in seinen internen Mechanismen kann ihm unmöglich entgangen sein."

languages.text: "Denetim protokolü, kutsal makinenin en az 30 tam dönüş önce 'çapa çekirdeği' olarak tanımlanan zeno kâfirliği ile kirlendiğini gösterdi. Zanaatkâr Decabalus-4-16, belirtilen tüm süre boyunca istasyondan sorumluydu. Sondaj kompleksinin {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhuyla{/g} iletişim kurdu ve onu bizzat kutsadı. İç mekanizmalarına güç veren teknoyozluktan habersiz olması mümkün değil."
languages.original_text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."

traits.locale_text: "Denetim protokolü, kutsal makinenin en az 30 tam dönüş önce 'çapa çekirdeği' olarak tanımlanan zeno kâfirliği ile kirlendiğini gösterdi. Zanaatkâr Decabalus-4-16, belirtilen tüm süre boyunca istasyondan sorumluydu. Sondaj kompleksinin {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhuyla{/g} iletişim kurdu ve onu bizzat kutsadı. İç mekanizmalarına güç veren teknoyozluktan habersiz olması mümkün değil."

languages.text: « Le protocole d'inspection a indiqué que la machine sacrée avait été contaminée par une xénohérésie du nom de "noyau ancestral" il y a au moins 30 tours complets. L'artisan Décabalus-4-16 était responsable de la station pendant toute la période spécifiée. Il a communiqué avec {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}l'esprit de la machine{/g} du complexe et l'a personnellement consacré. Il ne pouvait ignorer la corruption qui alimentait ses mécanismes internes. »
languages.original_text: "The inspection protocol indicated that the sacred machine was contaminated with xenoheresy, identified as the 'anchor-core,' at least 30 full turns ago. Artisan Decabalus-4-16 was in charge of the station for the entire time specified. He communicated with the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g} of the drill complex and personally consecrated it. He could not have been unaware of the tech-corruption powering its internal mechanisms."
